overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player walking through a storm-damaged urban park toward a city skyline. The player holds a weapon with a green reflex sight while approaching skyscrapers shrouded in dark clouds and smoke. A green toxic gas effect becomes visible as the player nears the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park paved pathway with stairs

events.description: turns left off the stairs onto the main park pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along paved path holding weapon with green reflex sight, approaching the stormy city skyline

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to elevated area on the left side of the path
wet paved walkway reflecting the stormy sky
tall dark glass towers shrouded in storm clouds and distant smoke
scattered deciduous trees with green foliage lining the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a paved urban park pathway with concrete stairs visible to the left. The player walks forward holding a weapon with a green reflex sight, passing through an area with scattered trees while modern glass skyscrapers loom in the stormy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy park area with tree clusters

events.description: leaves paved path and enters grassy terrain between trees

agents.ego_description: moving through grass between trees toward the skyscraper skyline

entered.detail: uneven grassy terrain replacing the paved walkway
large boulders and rock outcroppings scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the paved path onto grassy terrain, navigating between clusters of trees. Rock formations begin to appear on the left as the camera moves deeper into the park area, with the skyscrapers shifting to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grass field approaching devastated city center

events.description: green toxic gas cloud becomes visible rising between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: traversing open grass field with scattered rocks while approaching the smoke-shrouded buildings

entered.detail: luminescent green smoke or gas rising from the ground between the towers

segments.scene_description: Moving through open grass with fewer trees, the player approaches the city center where a green toxic gas cloud becomes visible rising between the skyscrapers. The terrain features scattered rock formations as the buildings grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: devastated urban park with toxic gas infestation

agents.ego_description: approaching the dense green gas cloud while navigating uneven grassy terrain with rocks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player continuing toward the city center with the green toxic gas now prominent in the mid-ground. The skyscrapers tower overhead on the left as the player moves through the grassy field, with the ominous gas cloud growing denser and closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a structured urban park pathway toward a looming, toxic city center. It begins on a paved walkway with concrete stairs to the left, where the player carries a weapon with a green reflex sight toward distant glass skyscrapers under a stormy sky. As the camera moves forward, the pavement gives way to grassy terrain and clusters of trees, with rock formations appearing on the left as the skyscrapers shift their position in the frame. The scene then opens into a wider grassy field where a green toxic gas cloud first becomes visible, rising ominously between the buildings. Finally, the camera advances deeper into the field as the skyscrapers tower overhead and the dense green gas grows increasingly prominent in the mid-ground.
